title: CRSU Date Sheet 2026 OUT

detail.title: CRSU Date Sheet 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: CRSU Date Sheet 2026 released for May-June exams. Check UG and PG even semester exam schedules and download official PDF at crsu.ac.in.

content.text: Chaudhary Ranbir Singh University has published the final and tentative date sheets for May-June 2026 examinations. The timetable covers various UG, PG, and professional courses including B.Ed and B.El.Ed programmes.
Direct Link to Download Official CRSU Date Sheet 2026 Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download Official CRSU Date Sheet 2026 Here

content.text: CRSU has released the date sheets for even semester examinations to be held in May-June 2026. These schedules are available for both NEP and Non-NEP students across regular, reappear, and additional paper categories.

rows: UG, PG, Diploma, B.Ed, B.El.Ed (NEP & Non-NEP)

sections.heading: How to Download CRSU Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the CRSU Date Sheet 2026 from the official university website. Follow these simple steps to get your exam timetable.

items: Visit the official CRSU website and go to the Date Sheet section.
Click on the relevant date sheet link as per your course and semester.
The PDF will open in a new tab. Save the file to your device.
Take a printout and read all instructions carefully.
Cross-check your paper codes and exam dates before preparation.

content.text: Always refer to the latest official date sheet and keep a printed copy for your exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in CRSU Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official CRSU Date Sheet 2026 PDF contains all important information students need for the upcoming examinations.

items: Exact Date and Day of Examination
